nodes.label: Production Postgres (asyncpg + connection pool)
nodes.rationale: SQLite is single-writer with weak concurrency; production requires Postgres. Code is already SQLAlchemy/Advanced Alchemy so this is validation + pool config (pool size, max overflow, pool_pre_ping via Settings), not a rewrite.

nodes.label: Postgres Concurrency Validation (unit-of-work, atomic invite UPDATE)
nodes.rationale: create_team/register unit-of-work flows and the atomic invite UPDATE must be re-exercised on Postgres because SQLite masked an earlier autocommit issue; _as_utc datetime coercion should be a no-op on timestamptz.
